title: Rich Syrian Eggplant Roast
description: A bitter, creamy low-carb Syrian eggplant roast featuring pineapple and tahini. Broiled to a caramelized finish, it's comforting and easy to digest on a sick day.
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Slice eggplants into ½-inch thick rounds and arrange them on the prepared sheet.
Drizzle olive oil over the eggplant slices and season with salt, pepper, cumin, and minced garlic.
Roast the eggplants for 15 minutes, flip them, then add diced pineapple on top and roast for another 10 minutes until caramelized.
In a small bowl, whisk together tahini, Greek yogurt, and lemon juice until smooth.
Remove the eggplants and pineapple from the oven and let them cool slightly.
Spoon the creamy tahini sauce over each slice and garnish with a sprinkle of chopped cilantro (optional).
Serve warm as a comforting low-carb dinner.
